issues.detail: Instructions are not explicitly described, relying solely on code examples.
Error handling and edge cases are not addressed in the examples.

scenarios.name: setup-experiment-tracking
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B uses MLflow and omits comet_ml-specific calls.

scenarios.name: register-and-compare-models
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items, missing only the api.query comparison, while Response A omits key API calls and registry steps.
